column_key.first_trade_id: Minimum trade_id in native result rows.
column_key.last_trade_id: Maximum trade_id in native result rows.
column_key.quantity_sum_total: Deterministic sum of aligned quantity_sum values.
column_key.quote_quantity_sum: Deterministic sum of native quote_quantity values.
column_key.quote_volume_sum_total: Deterministic sum of aligned quote_volume_sum values.
column_key.row_count: Total rows returned in the fixture window for this run.
column_key.rows_hash_sha256: SHA256 of canonicalized result rows for this run.
column_key.size_sum: Deterministic sum of native size values.
column_key.source_checksums: Fixture source checksums (zip and csv sha256).
column_key.trade_count_total: Deterministic sum of aligned trade_count across buckets.
